typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: ' SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED; SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY LOW;  SELECT [ITEMID] ,[ROUTEJOBSUPDATED] ,[REQDATE] ,[QTY] ,[REQDATEORDER] ,[VENDID] ,[ITEMGROUPID] ,[REQPOSTATUS] ,[PURCHUNIT] ,[PLANVERSION] ,[SCHEDMETHOD] ,[PURCHID] ,[REQDATEDLV] ,[REFID] ,[REFTYPE] ,[ITEMROUTEID] ,[ITEMBOMID] ,[ITEMBUYERGROUPID] ,[COVINVENTDIMID] ,[REQTIMEORDER] ,[VENDGROUPID] ,[LEADTIME] ,[CALENDARDAYS] ,[SCHEDTODATE] ,[SCHEDFROMDATE] ,[PURCHQTY] ,[REQTIME] ,[BOMROUTECREATED] ,[ISDERIVEDDIRECTLY] ,[ISFORECASTPURCH] ,[INTVQR] ,[INTVMTH] ,[INTVWK] ,[COSTAMOUNT] ,[TRANSFERID] ,[PRODUCT] ,[PDSCWREQQTY] ,[PMFBULKORD] ,[PMFPLANNINGITEMID] ,[PMFSEQUENCED] ,[PMFYIELDPCT] ,[MODIFIEDDATETIME] ,[DEL_MODIFIEDTIME] ,[MODIFIEDBY] ,[DATAAREAID] ,[RECVERSION] ,[PARTITION] ,[RECID] ,[SEMADVPLANNINGORIGQTY] ,[SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQITEM] ,[SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQQTY] ,[SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYPART] ,[SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYREFID] ,[SEMPLANGROUPID] ,[SEMPLANGROUPPRIORITY] ,[AM_AUTOEMAILPO] ,[ADEC_ITEMPLANNERID] ,[ADEC_ITEMPLANNOTE] ,[ADEC_SENDELECTRONICALLY]   FROM	[AX2012R2_EDW].[dbo].[REQPO] WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE	[RECID] IN	( 			SELECT	[RECID]  			FROM	[dbo].[ztmp_REQPO_IDs] 			);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> AXSource
AXSource sink(input(
		ITEMGROUPID as string,
		ROUTEJOBSUPDATED as integer,
		PURCHID as string,
		SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYREFID as string,
		ADEC_ITEMPLANNERID as string,
		PRODUCT as long,
		QTY as integer,
		BOMROUTECREATED as integer,
		PARTITION as long,
		PDSCWREQQTY as integer,
		LEADTIME as integer,
		MODIFIEDBY as string,
		RECID as long,
		REQDATEDLV as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ITEMBOMID as string,
		SEMPLANGROUPPRIORITY as integer,
		PMFPLANNINGITEMID as string,
		REQTIMEORDER as integer,
		SCHEDFROMDATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		VENDID as string,
		INTVMTH as integer,
		TRANSFERID as string,
		PMFBULKORD as integer,
		CALENDARDAYS as integer,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQITEM as string,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGQTY as integer,
		ITEMID as string,
		ITEMBUYERGROUPID as string,
		REQDATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ISFORECASTPURCH as integer,
		ISDERIVEDDIRECTLY as integer,
		PMFSEQUENCED as integer,
		SCHEDTODATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		PURCHQTY as integer,
		INTVQR as integer,
		PURCHUNIT as string,
		ITEMROUTEID as string,
		REQPOSTATUS as integer,
		REQTIME as integer,
		REFTYPE as integer,
		COSTAMOUNT as integer,
		DEL_MODIFIEDTIME as integer,
		ADEC_SENDELECTRONICALLY as integer,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PMFYIELDPCT as integer,
		SEMPLANGROUPID as string,
		VENDGROUPID as string,
		SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYPART as string,
		REQDATEORDER as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		MODIFIEDDATETIME as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		REFID as string,
		AM_AUTOEMAILPO as integer,
		PLANVERSION as long,
		RECVERSION as integer,
		COVINVENTDIMID as string,
		SCHEDMETHOD as integer,
		ADEC_ITEMPLANNOTE as string,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQQTY as integer,
		INTVWK as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ITEMGROUPID,
		ROUTEJOBSUPDATED,
		PURCHID,
		SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYREFID,
		ADEC_ITEMPLANNERID,
		PRODUCT,
		QTY,
		BOMROUTECREATED,
		PARTITION,
		PDSCWREQQTY,
		LEADTIME,
		MODIFIEDBY,
		RECID,
		REQDATEDLV,
		ITEMBOMID,
		SEMPLANGROUPPRIORITY,
		PMFPLANNINGITEMID,
		REQTIMEORDER,
		SCHEDFROMDATE,
		VENDID,
		INTVMTH,
		TRANSFERID,
		PMFBULKORD,
		CALENDARDAYS,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQITEM,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGQTY,
		ITEMID,
		ITEMBUYERGROUPID,
		REQDATE,
		ISFORECASTPURCH,
		ISDERIVEDDIRECTLY,
		PMFSEQUENCED,
		SCHEDTODATE,
		PURCHQTY,
		INTVQR,
		PURCHUNIT,
		ITEMROUTEID,
		REQPOSTATUS,
		REQTIME,
		REFTYPE,
		COSTAMOUNT,
		DEL_MODIFIEDTIME,
		ADEC_SENDELECTRONICALLY,
		DATAAREAID,
		PMFYIELDPCT,
		SEMPLANGROUPID,
		VENDGROUPID,
		SEMADVPLANNINGPRIMARYPART,
		REQDATEORDER,
		MODIFIEDDATETIME,
		REFID,
		AM_AUTOEMAILPO,
		PLANVERSION,
		RECVERSION,
		COVINVENTDIMID,
		SCHEDMETHOD,
		ADEC_ITEMPLANNOTE,
		SEMADVPLANNINGORIGREQQTY,
		INTVWK)) ~> OLEDBDestination
